rulings.Case Title: CECIL STEPHENS VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Grundfos Cbs, Inc.S Joinder To Defendant Bell Industries, Inc.S Motion To Exclude Plaintiffs Expert Witnesses William Salyer, M.D., Samuel Hammar, M.D., And Barry Horn, M.D., Or In The Alternative, To Continue The Trial Date
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Motion Calendar for Friday, June 10, 2011 in Department 611 at 9:00 a.m. Defendant Grundfos CBS, Inc.¿s joinder, and all other joinders, to Bell Industries, Inc.¿s motion to exclude plaintiff¿s expert witnesses Samuel Hammar, M.D., William Salyer, M.D., and Barry Horn, M.D., or in the alternative, to continue the trial date will be heard at 9:30am in Department 503, Hon. Teri L. Jackson presiding. The motion to continue the trial date is granted. The trial date is continued to August 15, 2011 at 11:15am in Department 220. Good cause exists for a continuance pursuant to CRC 3.1332. Expert discovery will remain open as if the new trial date was the initial trial date. Fact discovery remains closed. The alternative motion to exclude Dr. Hammar, Dr. Salyer and Dr. Horn is denied. If a hearing is requested, it will be at 9:30am. = (503/TLJ)
